query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Long-exposure photograph of flowing water over dark rocks, with streaked white water channels, warm orange-brown stone edges, and reflected light in a small pool.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavily motion-blurred long-exposure photograph of flowing water over dark rocks, where all fine detail dissolves into smeared streaks of white water channels, warm orange-brown stone edges, and reflected light; the extreme intentional blur renders textures and rock surfaces unrecognizably abstract, leaving only gestural rivers of light and color in an almost entirely non-representational composition.
